name: EGB OE TL.Z./HEIDELBERGCEM
summary: Heidelberg Materials AG, formerly known as HeidelbergCement, is a German multinational building materials company. The company produces cement, aggregates (crushed rock, gravel, and sand), ready-mixed concrete, and asphalt. Heidelberg Materials is headquartered in Heidelberg, Germany, and its business model focuses on supplying these materials to the construction industry globally.
